🚀 Big Launches.title: OpenAI Campus Network: Student club interest form
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Join the OpenAI Campus Network to connect student clubs worldwide, access AI tools, host events, and build an AI-powered campus community.

🚀 Big Launches.title: OpenAI just released its answer to Claude Mythos
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenAI is launching Daybreak, an AI initiative focused on detecting and patching vulnerabilities before attackers find them.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Where Reliability Lives in Vision-Language Models: A Mechanistic Study of Attention, Hidden States, and Causal Circuits
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A study on the reliability of vision-language models, focusing on attention maps and hidden states.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Spatial Priming Outperforms Semantic Prompting: A Grid-Based Approach to Improving LLM Accuracy on Chart Data Extraction
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A study on improving LLM accuracy on chart data extraction using spatial priming.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Auto-Rubric as Reward: From Implicit Preferences to Explicit Multimodal Generative Criteria
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A study on aligning multimodal generative models with human preferences using auto-rubric as reward.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Embeddings for Preferences, Not Semantics
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A study on embedding opinions in a vector space for collective decision-making.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: On Distinguishing Capability Elicitation from Capability Creation in Post-Training: A Free-Energy Perspective
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A study on the distinction between capability elicitation and creation in post-training.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: MemQ: Integrating Q-Learning into Self-Evolving Memory Agents over Provenance DAGs
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: A study on integrating Q-learning into self-evolving memory agents.

⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Google says it has spotted and stopped a zero-day exploit developed with AI.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Thinking Machines wants to build an AI that actually listens while it talks
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Thinking Machines is working on a model that processes input and generates a response simultaneously, like a phone call.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more interactive and human-like models, with a focus on reliability, trustworthiness, and responsible AI practices.
